html:
Exclusive to:

The Friendly Scarecrow is an exclusive Structure in Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It requires a Pumpkin, three Cut Grass, and three Boards to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. Its only function is to replace Crows within 12 wall units with Canaries. If burned down and Hammered, it will drop a Hot Pumpkin, instead of a raw one.

The Friendly Scarecrow has 17 different possible face expressions on the pumpkin. The face on the Friendly Scarecrow's pumpkin will change at the dawn of a new day, struck with a hammer, or when being set on fire. Friendly Scarecrows can be dressed with all types of Skins, including shirts, gloves, pants and shoes.

Trivia

  • The Friendly Scarecrow was added in the Warts and All update. The ability to dress it with Skins was added later in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.
  • There are face variants that resemble Webber, Deerclops, and Charlie in her monstrous form.
  • Wilson's inspection quote may be a play on his inspection quote for the Mannequin item. Similarly, Webber's inspection quote is the exact same as their quote for the Mannequin.

Gallery

  • Friendly Scarecrow as seen in the poster for the Warts and All update.
  • Willow next to a Friendly Scarecrow.
  • The 17 faces of the Friendly Scarecrow.
  • WX-78 dancing next to a Friendly Scarecrow.
  • A burnt Friendly Scarecrow.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Friendly Scarecrow
"Models all the latest fall fashions."

"scarecrow"
“All dressed up and nowhere to crow.”
–Wilson
“Ha! He thinks he's people!”
–Willow
“Ha! Is not man! Is straw!”
–Wolfgang
“Who would want to scare crows away?”
–Wendy
“THIS STRAW ROBOT IS TERRIBLE”
–WX-78
“Ah, excellent. No more leaving clothes on branches to get wrinkled.”
–Wickerbottom
“He's doing the world a service.”
–Woodie
“It's an empty shell of a man.”
–Maxwell
“Döst thöu yearn för a brain?”
–Wigfrid
“Let's play dress up!”
–Webber
“He seems nice.”
–Warly
“Tweeter Friend”
–Wormwood
“Doesn't look too scary.”
–Winona
“Good day to you, sir!”
–Wortox
“Like him very much!”
–Wurt
“Who'd be scared of that?”
–Walter
“I think our definition of "friendly" differs somewhat.”
–Wanda
The Friendly Scarecrow is an exclusive Structure in Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It requires a Pumpkin, three Cut Grass, and three Boards to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. Its only function is to replace Crows within 12 wall units with Canaries. If burned down and Hammered, it will drop a Hot Pumpkin, instead of a raw one.
The Friendly Scarecrow has 17 different possible face expressions on the pumpkin. The face on the Friendly Scarecrow's pumpkin will change at the dawn of a new day, struck with a hammer, or when being set on fire. Friendly Scarecrows can be dressed with all types of Skins, including shirts, gloves, pants and shoes.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Friendly Scarecrow was added in the Warts and All update. The ability to dress it with Skins was added later in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.
There are face variants that resemble Webber, Deerclops, and Charlie in her monstrous form.
Wilson's inspection quote may be a play on his inspection quote for the Mannequin item. Similarly, Webber's inspection quote is the exact same as their quote for the Mannequin.

The '''Friendly Scarecrow''' is an exclusive [[Structures|Structure]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It requires a [[Pumpkin]], three [[Cut Grass]], and three [[Boards]] to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. Its only function is to replace [[Crow]]s within 12 wall units with [[Canary|Canaries]]. If burned down and [[Hammer]]ed, it will drop a [[Hot Pumpkin]], instead of a raw one.

The Friendly Scarecrow has 17 different possible face expressions on the pumpkin. The face on the Friendly Scarecrow's pumpkin will change at the dawn of a new [[day]], struck with a hammer, or when being set on fire. Friendly Scarecrows can be dressed with all types of [[Skins]], including shirts, gloves, pants and shoes.

=={{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Friendly Scarecrow was added in the ''[[A New Reign#September 23, 2016 - Warts and All|Warts and All]]'' update. The ability to dress it with Skins was added later in the ''[[A New Reign#November 3, 2016 - Cute Fuzzy Animals|Cute Fuzzy Animals]]'' update.
* There are face variants that resemble [[Webber]], [[Deerclops]], and [[Charlie]] in her monstrous form.
* Wilson's inspection quote may be a play on his inspection quote for the [[Mannequin]] item. Similarly, Webber's inspection quote is the exact same as their quote for the Mannequin.
